project: Sezonski rad Srbija | Poslovi i iskustva radnika
known_limitations: Obsidian vault is a manual system — operator must create files, update statuses, and fill KPIs by hand
Dataview queries require Obsidian with Dataview plugin installed
No automation for Facebook actions — all posts, messages, approvals are manual
Multilingual templates are ready but translations should be reviewed by native speakers before use
Sample records are illustrative — real data must be collected by the operator
Validation is manual — run through test-cases.md checklist
No CI/CD for the vault — it is a folder of markdown files
